metadata.description: Estimated JRN for 50 (join, task) pairs across 13 FK joins and 5 tasks. Quadratic fit b2=-0.8159 (p=0.0714). Inverted-U not confirmed.

metadata.title: JRN Estimation & Multiplicative Compounding on rel-stack
metadata.summary: Estimated JRN for 16 (join, task) pairs using MLP probe method (hidden=32, layers=2, epochs=10, seeds=3). Validated multiplicative compounding on 14 multi-hop chains (R²=0.8283). Join classifications: 13 high-value, 3 critical, 0 low-value.

votes_posts_for_postvotes.note: corrected JRN (inverted for neg_MAE so >1 = improvement)

votes_stronger_than_postlinks.expected: votes JRN > postLinks JRN for post-votes

key_findings: Votes->Posts corrected JRN for post-votes = 1.2750 (confirms domain expectation)
Badges->Users JRN for user-badge = 1.5522 (confirms domain expectation)

examples.input: {"phase": "phase1_individual_jrn", "join": "comments.UserId -> users.Id", "task": "user-engagement", "entity_table": "users", "child_table": "comments", "question": "What is the JRN for join 'comments.UserId -> users.Id' on task 'user-engagement'? How much does adding aggregated child features improve the probe metric?"}

key_findings: user-churn: JRN-fanout ρ=0.94 → correlated with fan-out
item-sales: JRN-fanout ρ=-0.43 → decorrelated (JRN captures more than cardinality)
